text: This is the final abscess cavity the borders of which have been placated to prevent any bleeding because the whole tissue was granulomatous and it was bleeding so we just placated the circumferential border with proline 3-0 and as you can see this is the final abscess cavity which has been drained and we are planning to put a chest tube inside this cavity and the wash has been given as can be seen there is no active bleed as of now
This is the appearance of the cavity.
Under which ground I think 1.2 to 1.5 meter pass was collected.
This is the center pass for examination.
